title: astracantha elisabethae
intro: Astracantha elisabethae, also known as the Elizabeth's thorn or Astragalus elisabethae, is a plant species within the legume family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Astracantha elisabethae are believed to include its ability to support the immune system and reduce the severity of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and tuberculosis. Astracantha elisabethae is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions.
